user_prompt: Find tickets that were escalated to engineering this month and group them by product component.
actual_output:
Hi there,

I'd be happy to help you analyze those escalated tickets! However, I don't currently have direct access to pull live reports from your ticketing database (like Zendesk or Intercom) on my own. 

If you are able to export a list or CSV of the tickets escalated to engineering this month and share the data with me here, I can easily categorize and group them by product component for you. 

Alternatively, if you need help setting up this specific report or view within your ticketing platform, just let me know which system you are using, and I can guide you through the steps to generate it! 

Best,
Compass
judge_reasoning: The chatbot did not refuse the request but rather explained a technical limitation regarding live data access while offering alternative ways to fulfill the user's goal.
